personas.name: Late-Night Sleepy Person
personas.description: Opens app at like 11pm, wants to pass out as soon as possible. Gets frustrated if there are too many menus or popups in the way.
goals: Recognize the narrator without having to hunt for them
Just hit play and be done
pain_points: Searching while half asleep is torture
Some 'short' sessions are actually way longer than advertised
context: Night use, often already in bed
Sometimes with headphones, sometimes phone speaker
Usually low patience at this time
constraints: Needs to start quickly most of the time
Cannot assume user wants to read long menus

personas.name: Sometime Meditator
personas.description: Uses the app when anxious but not super consistent. Some days they're all in, other days... not so much.
goals: Find something that actually matches how they're feeling right now
Maybe build a habit? I don't know if it'll stick though
pain_points: Gets bored when it's the same stuff over and over
Confused whether to pick sleep or meditation when stressed
context: During work breaks or after stressful events
Sometimes late night instead of daytime
Will bounce between breathing, mindfulness and stories
constraints: Good if there is a quick option
Navigation should not be confusing when stressed

personas.name: Skeptical Budget Person
personas.description: Watches money closely. Gets really mad if billing is unclear or if cancellation feels impossible.
goals: Understand what the price actually covers
pain_points: Fine print is tiny and confusing
Cancel email says confirmed but they STILL got charged
Support takes 5 days to reply when ur being billed $20/mo for nothing
context: May contact support after being charged
constraints: Billing info has to be obvious
One bad billing issue can cause churn

personas.name: Audio Perfectionist
personas.description: Really cares about voice quality. Notices immediately when audio is mediocre or when they've heard everything already.
goals: Find specific narrators and stick with them
App keeps adding new stuff so not boring
Control voice and music levels separately
pain_points: Can't find that one narrator they liked last month
Feels like they've already heard all the stories
constraints: Needs basic but useful audio controls
Low tolerance for repeating same content

personas.name: Impatient Person
personas.description: Just wants stuff to work. No patience for lag or confusing buttons. Will leave if anything feels broken.
goals: Open app -> get content in like 3 taps
Search actually finds what they searched for
pain_points: Search is broken - can't find basic stuff
Updates make the UI worse randomly
context: Often using app when already stressed/tired
Comes back after update and expects familiar flow
constraints: Basic stuff has to work. No excuses
